ItacPersonItem.Notes: Piedmontese nobleman. Montoni proposed the comparison between love and painters of lanscapes, the day he was affiliated to the Academy. He joined the Ricovrati in 1601.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
